Name: Columbia Mud Roller Replacement - 80 mm / 3"
Description:
Columbia Mud Roller Replacement - 80 mm / 3" provides a high-performance solution for applying joint compound to drywall surfaces with speed and precision. This professional-grade replacement sleeve ensures consistent mud distribution and significantly reduces application time during the taping process.

Designed specifically for the Columbia Mud Roller system, this 3-inch version is ideal for narrower surfaces and detail work where controlled mud delivery is required. The durable material resists wear and maintains its structural integrity through repeated use on demanding jobsites.

Features:

  • Precision Application: The 80mm width allows for controlled mud delivery on tight corners and narrow drywall sections.
  • High-Absorbency Material: Engineered to hold a significant amount of compound, reducing the frequency of re-loading from the bucket.
  • Seamless Compatibility: Fits perfectly on the standard Columbia 3-inch mud roller frame for quick field replacements.
  • Professional Durability: Built to withstand the abrasive nature of drywall compounds and frequent cleaning cycles.
Meta: search_keywords: Columbia, FMR3X18MM, mud roller, compound roller, 3 inch roller, 80mm roller, drywall tools
Meta: seo_description: Upgrade your drywall finishing with the Columbia 80mm (3") Mud Roller Replacement. Durable FMR3X18MM sleeve for even compound application. In stock now.
Meta: seo_secondary_keywords: drywall mud roller sleeve, 80mm compound roller, Columbia FMR3X18MM, plastering roller replacement

Name: Columbia Mud Roller Replacement - 220 mm / 9"
Description:
Columbia Mud Roller Replacement - 220 mm / 9" is a professional-grade applicator sleeve designed for the efficient and uniform distribution of drywall joint compound. This high-capacity nap is engineered to hold a significant volume of mud, allowing for consistent coverage across flat surfaces and internal corners with minimal effort.

Built for the rigors of professional job sites, this replacement roller ensures a smooth finish that prepares surfaces perfectly for skimming or taping. Its durable construction maintains structural integrity even when saturated with heavy compounds, providing a reliable tool for high-volume drywall finishing projects.

Features:

  • High-Absorbency Nap: Specifically designed to retain and release joint compound evenly for maximum surface coverage.
  • 9-Inch Width: The 220mm profile provides a wide application path, significantly increasing speed during the initial mudding phase.
  • Precision Fit: Engineered to fit securely on standard Columbia mud roller frames, preventing slipping or uneven pressure during use.
  • Easy Maintenance: The synthetic fibers are designed for quick cleaning and rapid reuse, ensuring long-term durability in professional environments.
Meta: search_keywords: Columbia, FMR9X18MM, mud roller, compound roller, drywall roller sleeve, 220mm roller
Meta: seo_description: Professional 9-inch (220mm) Columbia Mud Roller Replacement sleeve. High-capacity nap for even drywall compound application. SKU: FMR9X18MM.
Meta: seo_secondary_keywords: drywall compound roller, plastering roller sleeve, FMR9X18MM, Columbia taping tools, mud applicator nap
